title: Redesign login page to be compelling and on-brand
description: The current login page looks bare and unpolished. Redesign it to sell Unpack's value proposition — conversational presentation coaching — so users are convinced to sign in and try it. Should feel professional, warm, and confident (matching the existing Unpack design system). Think landing page energy, not just a login form.
acceptance_criteria: Login page communicates what Unpack does and why it's different
Visual design matches the warm/confident Unpack brand (dark bg, gold accent, clean typography)
Responsive — looks good on mobile and desktop
Google OAuth sign-in button is prominent and clear
Page loads fast — no heavy assets
